Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp.JsonRpcResponse

Packages that use JsonRpcResponse
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp
Juneau @Marshalled types for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) wire format.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.

    Description

    Sets the error payload.
    JsonRpcResponse

    Sets the response id.
    JsonRpcResponse

    Sets the JSON-RPC protocol version.
    JsonRpcResponse
    JsonRpcResponse.setResult(Object value)
    Sets the result payload.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp that return JsonRpcResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JsonRpcResponse
    McpDispatcher.dispatch(JsonRpcRequest req, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx)
    Dispatch the supplied JSON-RPC request against the supplied configuration.
    static JsonRpcResponse
    Mcp.handle(JsonRpcRequest req, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx)
    Dispatches a JSON-RPC request through the shared McpDispatcher instance.
    JsonRpcResponse
    McpRestServlet.handleMcp(JsonRpcRequest req, RestRequest restReq)
    MCP JSON-RPC endpoint.
    default JsonRpcResponse
    McpEndpoint.handleMcpRequest(JsonRpcRequest req, RestRequest restReq)
    Default MCP JSON-RPC endpoint handler.
